description: Rules correlating stressor patterns with check-in mood data

rules.title: High stress, low mood
rules.message: Your stressors have been intense this week and your mood reflects it. Consider prioritizing a relief activity.

rules.title: Stressor spike
rules.message: You're logging far more stressors than check-ins — don't forget to pause and check in with yourself.

rules.title: One area keeps coming up
rules.message: One area of your life is generating most of your stress this week. Might be worth a closer look.

rules.title: Resilience showing
rules.message: Despite heavy stressors, your mood is holding steady. That's resilience.

rules.title: Mood is low, but stress isn't the cause
rules.message: Your stress is low but mood is down — sometimes the cause isn't external. Check in with yourself.
